user.title: Centralite bridge connection
user.description: Select your system type and the serial port that connects to the Centralite bridge.

data_description.baud: Default is 19200; change only if you modified the bridge default.

import.title: Import names and device IDs
import.description: Paste your {system} configuration export into the first field to bulk-import friendly names, scene names, and the list of devices to expose. Or enter comma-separated IDs in the other fields if you don't have an export file.

error.import_failed: Could not parse the provided configuration. Check the file contents or use the comma-separated fields instead.

init.title: Centralite options
init.description: Tune how the integration polls the bridge for state changes.

data.append_cr: Bridge sends carriage return after responses (Elegance Customer Option bit #6)

data_description.poll_interval: How often to send a full ^G query to catch any state drift. Push events are the primary update path; this is a safety net for loads that aren't programmed for spontaneous output.
